title: Divide by 2
essential_question: What does it mean to divide by 2?

pretest.stem: Two friends share 16 marbles equally. How many each?

learn.title: Dividing by 2
learn.content: Dividing by 2 is the same as finding half. 10 ÷ 2 = 5 because half of 10 is 5.

learn.title: Use Doubles
learn.content: If you know 2 × 8 = 16, then 16 ÷ 2 = 8. Doubles facts help you divide by 2 quickly.

learn.title: Model It
learn.content: To find 14 ÷ 2: draw 2 circles. Deal 14 counters evenly. Each circle gets 7.

hints: Think about what divide by 2 means.
Try drawing a picture or using a number line.

feedback.incorrect: Not quite. The answer is B. Remember how divide by 2 works.

practice_r3.stem: Which three division problems have the same answer? A) 14÷2  B) 21÷3  C) 28÷4  D) 16÷2
